emails.subject: Your Wiseman assessment results — Dr. Wiseman noticed a few patterns, [FIRST_NAME]
emails.preview: What your score is pointing to
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME] — quick note from Dr. Wiseman at Wiseman Family Practice.

I reviewed your Custom Health Assessment, and a few patterns stood out:

* Primary focus: [CORE_ISSUE_1]
* Secondary contributors: [CORE_ISSUE_2], [CORE_ISSUE_3]
* Common symptoms in this pattern: [SYMPTOM_A], [SYMPTOM_B], [SYMPTOM_C]

Here is the thing about integrative family medicine: it means I know you — not just your labs. And when I know you, I can see patterns that a 10-minute visit never surfaces.

The 3 things that create the most meaningful shift for people with [CORE_ISSUE_1]:

1. Identify what is actually driving the pattern — through a thorough intake, not just a standard panel
2. Build a plan that fits your life and your whole health picture
3. Follow through — adjusting as you respond, with real markers showing real progress

We are in Cedar Park, with patients across the Austin area, in-person and virtually.

Your next step:
* Option A: See your recommended first steps inside the app → [VIEW_MY_PLAN_LINK]
* Option B: Book a visit and let us work through your pattern together → [SCHEDULE_LINK]

— Dr. Jeremy Wiseman, MD
Wiseman Family Practice | Cedar Park, TX | wisemanfamilypractice.com

emails.subject: Why [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] often persists — the integrative medicine view
emails.preview: A helpful explanation most clinics skip
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

I want to share something that I find changes how patients understand their experience.

Family medicine, done well, is about continuity — knowing the patient across time and seeing patterns that a single-visit provider cannot see. Integrative medicine adds another layer: the willingness to look for the root, not just manage the symptom.

For a pattern like yours — with [PRIMARY_SYMPTOM] as a central complaint — the underlying driver is almost always something that has been present and building over time. Hormonal patterns that have gradually shifted outside the optimal range. A gut environment that is affecting systemic function. A chronic stress load that has dysregulated cortisol and is suppressing recovery.

Standard care tends to address the end result. Integrative family medicine starts earlier in the chain — where the intervention is simpler, less invasive, and more durable.

At Wiseman Family Practice, I combine the relationship and continuity of family medicine with the diagnostic depth of integrative and functional medicine. The result is care that actually knows you — and has the tools to find the root.

— Dr. Jeremy Wiseman, MD
Wiseman Family Practice | Cedar Park, TX | wisemanfamilypractice.com

[Book Your Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

emails.subject: A patient with your pattern — what changed when we took the full picture seriously
emails.body:
Hi [FIRST_NAME],

One last note before I close the loop.

A man in his late 40s came to my practice as a new patient after years of fatigue, creeping weight gain, and a low mood that he had attributed to getting older. He had seen multiple providers. Nothing had changed meaningfully.

In our first extended intake — which I make time for with every new patient — I identified a thyroid pattern that was technically within range but well below optimal, a hormonal picture consistent with andropause that had not been addressed, and a chronic sleep disruption that was suppressing his ability to recover.

We built a care plan that addressed all three. Targeted hormonal support. A structured approach to improving sleep quality. Specific nutritional interventions based on his panel.

Six months in, he described his energy as 'like when I was 35.' His weight had shifted, his mood had stabilized, and he said he finally felt like someone had taken the time to actually find the problem.

Individual results vary. Outcomes depend on many personal factors. But the pattern I see consistently: when you have the relationship to ask the right questions and the tools to find the root, the body responds.

— Dr. Jeremy Wiseman, MD
Wiseman Family Practice | Cedar Park, TX | wisemanfamilypractice.com

Disclaimer: Individual results vary. This is not medical advice.

[Schedule Your Visit →]([SCHEDULE_LINK])

gamma_content.digital_health_report:
🔎 DIGITAL SEO HEALTH REPORT — wisemanfamilypractice.com
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📊 DOMAIN SNAPSHOT
──────────────────
| Metric               | Value                         |
|----------------------|-------------------------------|
| Global Rank          | #150,177                      |
| Keywords Ranked      | 5,647                         |
| Monthly Traffic      | ~12,068 visits                |
| Traffic Value        | $2,726/mo                     |
| Keywords in Top 10   | 26                            |
| SERP Features Traffic| ~0/mo                         |


🔑 THE CORE FINDING: 5,647 KEYWORDS. ONLY 26 ON PAGE ONE.
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
5,647 keywords ranked. Only 12,068 monthly visitors. That is 2.1 visits per keyword — a clear signal that almost all of the site's rankings are buried on page two and beyond.

Position Breakdown:
• Pos #1: 6 keywords (top-of-page, ~28% CTR)
• Pos #2-3: 5 keywords (~15% CTR)
• Pos #4-10: 15 keywords (page 1, ~3-8% CTR)  ← ACTION ZONE
• Pos #11-20: 24 keywords (page 2, <1% CTR)
• Pos #21+: ~5,597 keywords (invisible)

99.5% of this site's keyword portfolio is generating almost zero traffic. This is not a content volume problem — Wiseman Family Practice has been publishing since 1978. This is a content targeting problem: existing pages are not optimized for how patients actually search.

The CTR reality: Positions 1-3 capture 54% of all clicks. Position 4-10 gets 3-8%.
Moving 15 keywords from pos 4-10 to pos 1-3 could 6-8× their traffic contribution.


🤖 AI SEARCH GAP
──────────────────
• 4 of your ranked keywords trigger Google AI Overviews on search results
• Your practice is cited in 0 of those AI-generated answers

→ You're invisible in AI-powered search despite 4 opportunities.
   Practices cited in AI Overviews receive 20-30% more qualified traffic from those searches.


🎯 BIGGEST OPPORTUNITY: HOLISTIC/INTEGRATIVE 'NEAR ME' CLUSTER
──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
This cluster has the highest-volume, lowest-competition opportunity in the entire portfolio. Wiseman ranks for all of these terms — just not high enough for anyone to see them.

Total cluster search volume: ~21,400/mo

[pos 16] holistic doctors near me — 12,100/mo  KD:41
[pos 11] holistic pediatrician near me — 6,600/mo  KD:42
[pos 5]  holistic primary care doctor near me — 590/mo  KD:27
[pos 7]  integrative md near me — 720/mo  KD:46
[pos 16] natural medicine near me — 1,000/mo  KD:51

Wiseman offers every service these searchers are looking for — holistic family care, integrative pediatrics, functional medicine — but the site doesn't have dedicated, optimized landing pages that speak to 'near me' intent. Google cannot surface a page that doesn't exist.

Opportunity: Moving this cluster from avg pos 11 → pos 3 = ~3,200 additional visits/mo at the current cluster CTR differential.


⚡ WITHIN STRIKING DISTANCE (pos 4-10)
──────────────────────────────────────
[pos 7] homeopathy near to me — 1,300 searches/mo
[pos 7] integrative md near me — 720 searches/mo
[pos 5] holistic primary care doctor near me — 590 searches/mo
[pos 9] functional medicine san antonio — 590 searches/mo
[pos 4] family practice waco tx — 590 searches/mo

→ Highest priority: 'homeopathy near to me' at pos 7 — 1,300/mo searches.
  With KD:18, this is the lowest-competition quick win in the entire portfolio. A single focused page update could move it to pos 1-3 within 60 days.


🏆 VS YOUR TOP COMPETITOR
──────────────────────────
westholisticmedicine.com:
  Keywords: 1,342  |  Traffic: 4,711/mo  |  Value: $8,022/mo
  Traffic efficiency: 3.5 visits per keyword

wisemanfamilypractice.com:
  Keywords: 5,647  |  Traffic: 12,068/mo  |  Value: $2,726/mo
  Traffic efficiency: 2.1 visits per keyword

Wiseman has 4× more keywords and 2.5× more raw traffic — but only one-third the traffic value. Westholisticmedicine is capturing far higher-intent, higher-value searches with fewer pages. Wiseman is winning on quantity; the competitor is winning on quality.


🎯 3-PRIORITY ATTACK PLAN
──────────────────────────

1. CREATE 'NEAR ME' LANDING PAGES
   Build dedicated location-optimized pages for 'holistic doctors near me,' 'holistic pediatrician near me,' and 'integrative MD near me' — the three highest-volume unranked clusters. These terms collectively represent 19,700+ searches/mo with KD below 50.
   Target: Move 3 cluster terms from pos 11-16 → pos 4-7 within 90 days

2. WIN THE AI OVERVIEW GAP
   Of 4 keywords triggering Google AI Overviews, Wiseman is cited in zero. Add structured FAQ content and authoritative 'what is' explainers for functional medicine, integrative pediatrics, and holistic primary care.
   Target: Cited in 2+ AI Overviews within 120 days; estimated +20-30% traffic lift on those queries

3. PUSH PAGE-1 KEYWORDS TO TOP 3
   15 keywords on page 1 (pos 4-10) including 'homeopathy near to me' (1,300/mo, KD:18) are within one content update of a top-3 position.
   Target: Move 5+ keywords from pos 4-10 → pos 1-3 within 60 days; estimated +800 visits/mo

careModels.name: Insurance-Based Primary Care
careModels.desc: Comprehensive integrative family medicine billed through most major insurance plans. Preventive care, chronic disease management, and whole-family wellness.

careModels.name: Direct Primary Care (DPC)
careModels.desc: Membership-based primary care with unlimited visits, same-day access, and a physician who truly knows you — no copays, no insurance middleman.

careModels.name: Concierge Medicine
careModels.desc: Enhanced personalized care beyond standard insurance. More time per visit, direct provider access, and premium preventive and functional medicine services.

careModels.name: Telemedicine (All of Texas)
careModels.desc: Access Wiseman's integrative and functional medicine providers from anywhere in Texas. Virtual appointments available for most services.
